# Azion Docs — marketplace

> All pages of the marketplace section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [How to install an integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/guides/install-an-integration/): This documentation will guide you to install an integration in an existing application.
- [How to update an integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/guides/update-an-integration/): This documentation will guide you to check the availability of an update and how to install it.
- [How to Install A/B Testing from Marketplace](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/ab-testing-marketplace/): How to use the A/B Testing integration from Marketplace.
- [How to Install Add Request ID from Marketplace](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/add-request-id-header/): The Azion Add Request ID integration enables you to add an additional HTTP header in the incoming request object.
- [How to deploy the AI Inference Starter Kit template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/ai-inference-starter-kit/): The AI Inference Starter Kit template allows you to create an application with OpenAI-compatible APIs, running directly on Azion's distributed network.
- [Deploy Apps with the Angular Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/angular-boilerplate/): The Angular Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build an Angular application on Azion.
- [How to deploy an Astro blog using a template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/astro-blog-starter-kit/): This template contains the configurations to create a new blog page based on the Astro framework.
- [How to deploy applications with the Astro Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/astro-boilerplate/): The Astro Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build Astro applications on Azion.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Astro Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/astro-ecommerce-collection/): This guide contains instructions to create an e-commerce application using templates based on Astro.
- [How to Install Axur Cardstream Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/axur-cardstream/): Protect your e-commerce from fraud with the Axur Cardstream integration.
- [How to Install the Axur Leakstream Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/axur-leakstream/): Protect your e-commerce from checker attacks and credential fraud with the Axur Leakstream integration, which monitors leaked credentials across the internet.
- [How to deploy the Azion Starter Kit](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/azion-starter-kit/): This template accelerates the creation of a basic edge stack to explore Azion's platform and its features.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Book Store React](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/book-store-react/): This template contains the configurations to create an e-commerce application based on the React framework.
- [How to block Tor Exit Nodes requests using a template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/bot-manager-lite-and-tor-block-starter-kit/): Deploy a basic security suite to protect your domains from bad bots and Tor Exit Nodes requests.
- [Add Bot Manager Lite to a Firewall](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/bot-manager-lite-integration-kit/): This template provides an easy way to integrate the Bot Manager Lite function in an existent Firewall on Azion.
- [How to test Bot Manager Lite using a template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/bot-manager-lite-starter-kit/): This template is ideal for understanding how Bot Manager Lite works and how it can help you secure your applications.
- [How to Install Azion Bot Manager Lite](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/bot-manager-lite/): Azion Bot Manager Lite analyzes incoming requests and assigns a score based on rules and behaviors to detect and prevent malicious activities.
- [Deploy a Web App with ButterCMS Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/butter-templates-collection/): The ButterCMS templates are headless content management systems to build and manage content-driven websites through APIs.
- [Deploy a Web App with Clean Astro + Sanity](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/clean-astro-sanity/): The Clean Astro + Sanity application template creates a minimal Astro website integrated with Sanity.io for content management. This guide teaches you how to deploy it on the Azion Web Platform.
- [How to Install Content Targeting Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/content-targeting-integration/): Content Targeting allows you to deliver distinct content to your users.
- [Deploy Apps with CosmicJS Agency Website](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/cosmic-agency-website/)
- [Deploy Apps with Cosmic Simple Astro Blog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/cosmic-simple-astro-blog/): The Cosmic Simple Astro Blog template allows you to create and manage a blog easily, using Astro and Cosmic headless CMS for content management.
- [Deploy Apps with Cosmic Simple Next.js Blog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/cosmic-simple-next-blog/): The Cosmic Simple Next.js Blog template allows you to create and manage a blog easily, using Next.js' capabilities for optimal performance and user experience.
- [How to Install DataDome Bot Protection](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/datadome-bot-protection/): DataDome Bot Protection is an AI-powered integration available at Azion Marketplace that detects and blocks automated threats in real time, protecting your websites, mobile apps, and APIs.
- [Deploy an Online Resume with DevsCard](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/devscard/): This template contains the configurations to create your online and print resume using the DevsCard project.
- [How to deploy the Docusaurus JavaScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/docusaurus-javascript-boilerplate/): This template is written in JavaScript using the Docusaurus framework, a static-site generator.
- [How to deploy the Docusaurus TypeScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/docusaurus-typescript-boilerplate/): This template is written in TypeScript using the Docusaurus framework, a static-site generator.
- [Deploy the File Optimization Template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/dynamic-and-static-file-optimization-template/): This template helps you to deploy an application with standard cache policies to improve the delivery of your content.
- [How to deploy the Applications Proxy template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/edge-application-proxy-template/): This template includes configurations that add a layer of engine rules to ignore all cache settings for a specific URL route.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Eleventy Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/eleventy-ecommerce-collection/): This guide contains instructions to create an e-commerce application using templates based on Eleventy.
- [How to deploy the Function Starter Kit template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/function-starter-kit/): The Function Starter Kit template allows you to create an function-based application without origin dependencies.
- [How to deploy a blog based on Gatsby using a template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/gatsby-blog-starter-kit/): This template includes the configurations to create a new blog page based on the Gatsby framework.
- [Deploy Apps with the Gatsby Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/gatsby-boilerplate/): Build a Single-Page Application (SPA) based on the Gatsby framework and run it directly on the edge of the network.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Gatsby Theme](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/gatsby-ecommerce-theme/): This template contains the configurations to create an e-commerce application based on the Gatsby framework.
- [How to Install the hCaptcha® Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/hcaptcha/): hCaptcha is an integration to protect your assets from bot attacks, SPAM, and others.
- [How to Install Hello World Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/hello-world/): Hello World is a integration to introduce the new users to the edge.
- [How to deploy applications with the Hexo Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/hexo-boilerplate/): Hexo Boilerplate facilitates you to build and run a Hexo Single-Page Application (SPA) directly on the edge.
- [Deploy & Test HTMX on the Edge](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/htmx-boilerplate/): Deploy and test a minimal example of the HTMX library in Azion Web Platform.
- [How to deploy the Hugo Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/hugo-boilerplate/): This template deploys a repository with a project based on Hugo, a framework written in Go, that enables you to create static sites.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Hugo Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/hugo-ecommerce-collection/): This guide contains instructions to create an e-commerce application using templates based on Hugo.
- [How to deploy the Image Optimization template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/image-optimization-template/): This template includes configurations for enhancing image loading and caching, based on the file extension.
- [How to Install IP Address Reputation](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/ip-address-reputation/): IP Address Reputation is an integration from IPQS that protects your online assets against malicious IPs.
- [How to Install the IPQualityScore Phone Validation Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/ipqs-phone-validation/): Validate phone numbers at the edge and detect fraudulent activity in real-time with the IPQualityScore Phone Validation integration.
- [How to Install the IPQualityScore URL Validation Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/ipqs-url-validation/): Scan URLs for malware, phishing, and suspicious domains in real-time at the edge with the IPQualityScore URL Validation integration.
- [How to Install the JavaScript Tag (JS TAG)](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/javascript-tag-js-tag/): Capture devices and network data to better identify devices accessing your applications, embedding a browser-level script.
- [How to deploy the Jekyll Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/jekyll-boilerplate/): This template deploys a repository with a project based on Jekyll, a framework written in Ruby, that enables you to create static sites using Markdown and HTML files.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Jekyll Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/jekyll-ecommerce-collection/): This guide contains instructions to create an e-commerce application using templates based on Jekyll.
- [How to Install the JWT Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/jwt/): JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) can be used to control access to your online resources.
- [How to deploy the LangGraph AI Agent Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/langgraph-ai-agent-boilerplate/): The LangGraph AI Agent Boilerplate allows you to create an AI agent with LangGraph.
- [How to Install Limit Payload Size](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/limit-payload-size/): The integration uses an function to check the Content-Length header of request data and block payloads exceeding a set limit.
- [How to Install the Liveness Detection Integration from Azion Marketplace](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/liveness-detection/): Liveness Detection is a biometric authentication integration powered by Saffe that runs on Azion's distributed architecture to prevent spoofing attacks using photographs or videos in real time.
- [How to Install Massive Redirect](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/massive-redirect-integration/): In this document you'll learn how to use a Azion's Markletplace integration to redirect your domains.
- [Method and Route Validator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/method-and-route-validator/): This function can be used to protect an application by blocking requests based on the URI and method used.
- [How to deploy the MongoDB Atlas Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/mongodb-atlas/): This template helps you to deploy an application integrated with MongoDB Atlas on the edge and manage it via API.
- [Deploy Neon Database Kit with Drizzle ORM](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/neon-database-with-drizzle/): This template contains the configurations to build and connect an application to Neon Database.
- [Deploy an E-commerce with Next.js Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/next-js-ecommerce-collection/): This guide contains instructions to create an e-commerce application using templates based on Next.js.
- [Deploy Apps with Next.js Static Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/nextjs-static-boilerplate/): The Next.js Static Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build a static Next.js application on Azion.
- [How to deploy the Nuxt Content template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/nuxt-content/): This template contains the configurations to create a blog or documentation website with Nuxt Content.
- [How to deploy the Nuxt Notes template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/nuxt-notes/): This template contains the configurations to create a basic note taking application with Nuxt.
- [How to deploy the Nuxt 3 Static Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/nuxt-static-boilerplate/): This template contains the configurations to build a static Nuxt 3 application.
- [Deploy Apps with Preact JavaScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/preact-javascript-boilerplate/): The Preact JavaScript Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build Preact with JavaScript applications on Azion.
- [Deploy Apps with Preact TypeScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/preact-typescript-boilerplate/): The Preact TypeScript Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build Preact with TypeScript applications on Azion.
- [Install Process Request Data Into Headers](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/process-request-data-into-headers/): This function stops a request if any request body field is empty, using regex to validate the existence and pattern of the field.
- [Use the QStash EdgeFunction Scheduler](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/qstash-function-scheduler/): The QStash EdgeFunction Scheduler template is designed to set up and manage a custom function, which receives a user-configured schedule and dispatches it through QStash.
- [How to deploy applications with the Qwik Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/qwik-boilerplate/): The Qwik Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build Qwik applications on Azion.
- [Deploy Apps with the Qwik Minimal Template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/qwik-minimal/): The Qwik Minimal template, provides an automation solution to build a basic Qwik application on Azion.
- [How to Install Radware Bot Manager](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/radware-bot-manager/): Radware Bot Manager is an integration to prevent a series of atacks on your website.
- [How to deploy applications with the React Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/react-boilerplate/): The React Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build a React application on Azion.
- [How to Install the reCAPTCHA Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/recaptcha/): reCAPTCHA is an integration to block attacks from bots, SPAM and others.
- [Install Request Variation Controller](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/request-variation-controller/): The Request Variation Controller integration is, in fact, two integrations that work together to protect your online assets.
- [How to Install Scheduled Blocking](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/scheduled-blocking/): Scheduled Blocking allows you to control the access to your application based on a time schedule, according to your needs.
- [How to Install the Secure Token Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/secure-token/): Azion Secure Token is a customizable integration that provides time-limited URLs with token-based authentication, commonly used to secure video assets for live streaming and on-demand content.
- [Install Send Event to Endpoint](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/send-event-to-endpoint/): This integration enables stream request data to an HTTP endpoint.
- [Install Send Messages to a Queue](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/send-messages-to-a-queue/): Send messages to a queue is a integration to help you in messaging services and queues.
- [How to Use Signed Cookies Integration](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/signed-cookies/): Signed cookies are a secure and vital tool used for authentication purposes for web developers that encrypt information and ensure session data integrity.
- [Deploy Apps with the EdgeSQL Starter Kit](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/sqldatabase-starter-kit/): The EdgeSQL Starter Kit provides an automation solution to build an application connected to an EdgeSQL database.
- [How to deploy the Static Cache template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/static-cache-template/): This template includes configurations for optimizing the delivery and performance of static content.
- [Deploy Static Cache + Videoteca Player](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/static-cache-videoteca-template/): Deploy an application with static cache settings using the Videoteca Player.
- [Deploy Apps with the Stencil Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/stencil-boilerplate/): The Stencil Boilerplate provides an automation solution for deploying a Stencil application on Azion.
- [Deploy TiDB Starter Kit with Drizzle ORM](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/tidb-with-drizzle/): This template contains the configurations to build and connect an application to TiDB.
- [Deploy Turso Starter Kit with Drizzle ORM](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/turso-with-drizzle/): This template contains the configurations to connect an application to a Turso database.
- [How to use Upstash GeoLocation through Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/upstash-geolocation-edgedeploy/): Upstash GeoLocation enables you to manage and deliver personalized greeting messages, based on geolocation.
- [How to Install Upstash Rate Limiting](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/upstash-rate-limiting-integration/): This integration allows you to control incoming traffic right at the edge and protect your applications.
- [Deploy the Upstash Rate Limit Template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/upstash-rate-limiting/): The Upstash Rate Limit template helps you to implement rate limiting in a serverless environment.
- [How to Install Videoteca Player](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/videofront-player/): Videoteca Player provides a quick way to host your own Videofront's Videoteca player.
- [How to deploy the VitePress JavaScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vitepress-javascript-boilerplate/): This template is written in JavaScript using VitePress, a static site generator built on top of Vite and Vue.js, which is ideal for creating documentation websites.
- [How to deploy the VitePress TypeScript Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vitepress-typescript-boilerplate/): This template is written in TypeScript using VitePress, a static site generator built on top of Vite and Vue.js, which is ideal for creating documentation websites.
- [How to deploy applications with the Vue Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vue-boilerplate/): The Vue Boilerplate provides an automation solution to build a Vue application on Azion.
- [Deploy Apps with the Vue3/Vite Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vue-vite-boilerplate/): This template accelerates the deployment of an application based on Vue3/Vite.
- [How to deploy the VuePress Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vuepress-boilerplate/): This template deploys a repository with a project based on VuePress.
- [Deploy a Web App with VuePress Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/vuepress-templates-collection/): This guide contains instructions to deploy a web application using templates based on VuePress.
- [How to Install Upstash Waiting Room](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/waiting-room/): Manage traffic surges and prevent overload on your websites and applications using a waiting room.
- [Deploy a Resume with Webpage to PDF](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/webpage-to-pdf-resume/): This template contains the configurations to create a resume for the web, print, or PDF using the Webpage to PDF Resume project.
- [Enhance WordPress with EdgeAccelerator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/integrations/wordpress-edgeaccelerator/): The WordPress EdgeAccelerator template helps you to migrate your WordPress website to run on the edge of the network.
- [Azion Marketplace first steps](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/first-steps/): Azion Marketplace is a digital catalog that makes it easy to find, test, and deploy edge-running software that runs anywhere.
- [Azion Integrations](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/integrations/): Use integrations to improve, compose, or customize your applications.
- [Become an ISV on Azion Marketplace](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/isv-signup/): Azion Marketplace is a curated digital catalog that allows companies to easily distribute their integrations to a wider audience.
- [Marketplace Seller Guide](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/marketplace-seller-guide/): Azion Marketplace is a curated digital catalog that offers ready-to-use edge-running software, accelerating the development workflow.
- [Azion Marketplace](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/marketplace/): Azion Marketplace is a digital catalog that makes it easy to find, test, and deploy edge-running software closer to the end user.
- [Azion Marketplace's permissions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/permissions-marketplace/): Permissions needed to install Azion Marketplace solution.
- [Templates and Integrations](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/templates-and-integrations-overview/): Speed up your workflow using templates and integrations provided by Azion.
- [Azion Templates](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/reference/templates/): Azion Templates help you quickly create and deploy new applications.
- [Angular Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/angular-boilerplate/): Jumpstart your web development with the Angular Boilerplate—a foundation for deploying Angular applications, a robust framework for building dynamic and responsive user interfaces.
- [ButterCMS + Angular Starter Project](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/angular-buttercms/): The ButterCMS + Angular Starter Project template creates a fully-functional Angular starter project, completely integrated with ButterCMS, a leading headless CMS that makes collaborative content management of your application easier.
- [Astro Audiophile](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-audiophile/): The Astro Audiophile template is a ready-to-deploy e-commerce demo built with the Astro framework. It ships with a polished storefront for audio gear, including product listings, a shopping cart, and a checkout flow. Although styled as an audio store, every component can be customized to sell any kind of product.
- [Astro Blog Starter Kit](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-blog-starter-kit/): The Astro Blog Starter Kit is a complete blog scaffold built with the Astro framework. It ships with Markdown-driven posts, automatic RSS feed and sitemap generation, and a clean, responsive reading layout. After deploying, you can edit the sample posts and interface right away to make the blog your own.
- [Astro Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-boilerplate/): The Astro Boilerplate provides a solid foundation for building fast, modern websites with minimal configuration. Designed to kickstart your next project, this starter comes pre-configured with performance best practices and a flexible project structure. It's a great starting point for static sites, landing pages, or any content-driven website.
- [Astro Cosmic Blog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-cosmic-blog/): The Cosmic Simple Astro Blog template helps you create and manage a blog easily, combining Astro's performance with Cosmic headless CMS for content management.
- [Astro DevsCard](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-devscard/): The DevsCard template contains the configurations to create your online and paper resume using the DevsCard project.
- [  Astro E-commerce](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-ecommerce/): The Astro E-commerce template is a starter solution for quickly launching an online store. Built on Astro's island architecture, it pairs static, fast-loading pages with interactive islands for dynamic features like the shopping cart. Its clean design and modular components make it straightforward to adapt the storefront to your own brand and catalog.
- [Astro with Markdoc](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-markdoc/): The Astro with Markdoc template deploys a new application based on Astro working with the experimental Markdoc integration.
- [Astro Markdown with plugins](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-markdown-with-plugins/): The Astro Markdown with plugins template showcases Astro's built-in Markdown support with additional, user-provided plugins.
- [Astro Markdown with Shiki](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-markdown-with-shiki/): The Astro Markdown with Shiki template demonstrates how to combine Astro's built-in Markdown support with Shiki for syntax highlighting in code blocks. It's ideal for technical blogs, documentation, or any website that needs a modern and readable code display.
- [Astro with MDX](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-mdx/): The Astro with MDX template deploys a new application based on Astro, using @astrojs/mdx to author content using MDX.
- [Astro Minimal](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-minimal/): The Astro minimal template deploys a minimal Astro project.
- [Astro with Multiple Frameworks](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-multiple-frameworks/): The Astro with Multiple Frameworks template showcases Astro's built-in support for multiple frameworks.
- [Astro with Nano Stores](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-nanostores/): The Astro with Nano Stores template showcases Astro's built-in support for nanostores to provide a shared state between components of any framework.
- [Astro Non-HTML pages](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-non-html/): The Astro with Non-HTML Pages template helps you to deploy an application based on Astro able to work with Non-HTML pages.
- [Astro Webpage to PDF Resume](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-pdf-resume/): The Webpage to PDF Resume template contains the configurations to create a resume for the web, print, or PDF using the Webpage to PDF Resume project. After the deployment, you can update it with your information and create your portfolio.
- [Astro Portfolio](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-portfolio/): The Astro Portfolio template helps you to create your online portfolio using an Astro-based example.
- [Astro with Preact Framework](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-preact/): The Astro with Framework Preact template deploys a new application based on Astro working with Preact.
- [Astro Quickstore](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-quickstore/): The Astro Quickstore helps you rapidly set up and deploy on the edge using the Astro framework and Tailwind CSS.
- [Astro with Sanity](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-sanity/): The Clean Astro + Sanity application template creates a minimal Astro website integrated with Sanity.io for content management.
- [Astro Starlog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-starlog/): The Astro Starlog template helps you to create Release Notes using this theme for Astro.
- [Astro with Tailwind CSS](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-tailwind/): The Astro with Tailwind CSS template deploys a new application based on Astro working with Tailwind CSS.
- [Astro with Vitest](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/astro-vitest/): The Astro with Vitest template deploys a new application based on Astro working with Vitest.
- [Cosmic Agency](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/cosmic-agency/): The CosmicJS Agency Website template helps you launch a dynamic, visually appealing marketing site for agencies and studios. Built with Next.js and the Cosmic headless CMS, it lets non-technical teams edit content without touching code. Deployed on Azion, every page is served via a distributed architecture for fast, globally distributed delivery.
- [Cosmic Simple Next.js Blog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/cosmic-nextjs-blog/): The Cosmic Simple Next.js Blog template helps you launch a fast, content-focused blog in minutes. It pairs the performance of Next.js with the Cosmic headless CMS, so writers manage posts and media from a friendly dashboard. Deployed on Azion, your articles are served via a distributed architecture for quick page loads worldwide.
- [Gatsby Blog](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/gatsby-blog/): The Gatsby Blog Starter Kit includes the configurations to create a new blog page based on the Gatsby framework. After the deployment, you can interact with the default posts and interface that already exist in this template and customize them.
- [Gatsby Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/gatsby-boilerplate/): The Gatsby Boilerplate helps you build a Single-Page Application (SPA) based on the Gatsby framework and run it directly on the edge of the network. By executing the boilerplate, several steps are encapsulated and automated, from repository management to edge deployment.
- [ButterCMS + Gatsby Starter Project](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/gatsby-butter-starter/): The ButterCMS + Gatsby Starter Project template creates a fully-functional Gatsby starter project, completely integrated with ButterCMS, a leading headless CMS that makes collaborative content management of your application easier.
- [Gatsby E-commerce](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/gatsby-ecommerce/): The Gatsby E-commerce Theme template enables you to deploy a Gatsby-based e-commerce site in a few steps, directly to the edge. It includes styled components and tools to add functionality, streamlining the customization process.
- [   Nextal](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/nextal/): With the Nextal template you can launch a Next.js SSR starter that comes preconfigured with Vitest, Tailwind CSS, and Hero Icons. It follows modern conventions such as Dark Mode, Atomic Design organization, and absolute imports, so you skip the setup and start building right away. Deployed on Azion, your app runs on a distributed architecture for fast, globally distributed delivery.
- [Next.js Static Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/nextjs-static-boilerplate/): The Next.js Static Boilerplate is a minimal Next.js 14 starter configured for static export. It streamlines and automates the deployment of statically generated sites directly to the edge, so you can skip boilerplate setup and focus on building your interface. Running on Azion, the prebuilt assets are served via a distributed architecture for fast, globally distributed delivery.
- [React Boilerplate](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/react-boilerplate/): The React Boilerplate is designed to simplify and enhance the deployment process for React.js applications directly on a distributed architecture of the network.
- [ButterCMS + React Starter Project](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/react-buttercms/): The ButterCMS + React Starter Project template creates a fully-functional React starter project, completely integrated with ButterCMS, a leading headless CMS that makes collaborative content management of your application easier.
- [Space Jelly Shop](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/marketplace/templates/space-jelly-shop/): The Space Jelly Shop template helps you launch a stylish online store built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. It ships with a product catalog, shopping cart powered by use-shopping-cart, and Stripe checkout, so you have a working storefront from the first deploy. Running on Azion, the shop is served via a distributed architecture for fast, globally distributed delivery.
